title: MLS admin election: partition_point insertion preserves sequence order
description:
GOOD CHOICE: online list maintains ascending sequence order via partition_point insertion (event.rs 246-250), never in-place sort. The invariant comment in app.rs (84-86) explicitly warns: 'Never sort this Vec in place — only rebuild from DirectoryList or insert at partition_point'.

This is maintained across multiple files:
- DirectoryList rebuilds the list from relay data (sorted by relay, line 148)
- UserJoined inserts at partition_point (line 250)
- Display code shows [A] marker at position 0 (ui.rs 65, event.rs 881)

The invariant ensures online[0] is the MLS admin across all peers even when UserJoined events arrive out-of-order. A contributor might want to 'simplify' by sorting in place for display, which would break the admin election.
close_reason: Verified invariant holds; nie-5xf0 documented in DESIGN.md §16 UTF-8 cursor boundary invariant; nie-pjxx and nie-h0ci already documented in DESIGN.md
